entity.summary: Digital-asset and tokenized-asset exchange platform combining centralized trading interfaces with decentralized custody and on-chain settlement on Provenance Blockchain.
entity.notes: Classified as hybrid because the current first-party site presents a full exchange and pro-trading interface while also emphasizing decentralized custody, on-chain control, and settlement through Provenance Blockchain. The OTC marketplace source row is treated as part of the same Figure Markets entity rather than a second exchange entity.

evidence.title: Figure Markets official platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes Figure Exchange, Trade and Pro Trade entry points, and describes crypto, HASH, and tokenized-asset trading with full on-chain control and decentralized custody.

evidence.title: Figure About Us
evidence.notes: First-party corporate page links Figure Markets Exchange as a current market product and describes Figure's blockchain-based capital-markets infrastructure.

evidence.title: Figure Markets exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange registry corroborates Figure Markets identity; the OTC marketplace row remains consolidated under the same entity.
